question: Will Platinum spot price on NYMEX exceed 1000 USD/oz on May 31, 2026?
textDescription:
This market tracks Platinum spot price on NYMEX.

Measurement date: May 31, 2026

Resolution:

YES if: Platinum spot price on NYMEX ≥ 1000 USD/oz on 2026-05-31

NO if: Platinum spot price on NYMEX < 1000 USD/oz on 2026-05-31

NYMEX futures and settlements, Johnson Matthey Market Report

Current platinum prices are around $1000/oz. Zimbabwe's export ban threatens a substantial share of global supply, potentially driving prices higher.

Rationale: The raw mineral export suspension in Zimbabwe could tighten the availability of platinum, leading to significant upward pressure on prices given the disruption in one of the world's major supply sources.

Source: Article
newsShortReason: Platinum spot price on May 27, 2026, is $1,922.00, well above $1,000.00.
newsKeyEvidence: Platinum spot price on May 27, 2026, is $1,922.00, well above $1,000.00. | Zimbabwe's export ban on raw minerals, including platinum, could tighten global supply, potentially increasing prices. | The World Platinum Investment Council forecasts a market deficit of 297,000 ounces in 2026, indicating supply shortages. | Zimplats' furnace maintenance in Zimbabwe led to a 26% year-on-year decline in platinum output in Q1 2026. | The current weather in Zimbabwe is hazy sunshine with temperatures ranging from 47°F to 77°F, unlikely to impact platinum prices.
